title: linophyllum
intro: Linophyllum, also known as Lycopodium clavatum, is a type of club moss that belongs to the lycopodiopsida class of plants. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of linophyllum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Linophyllum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
